entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: The practice of managing soil and water resources to prevent degradation and improve productivity

entities.name: INTEGRATED WATERSHED PROGRAM
entities.description: A comprehensive program for managing land and water resources within a watershed

entities.name: BUND CONSTRUCTION
entities.description: The act of building bunds across slopes to control erosion and soil loss

entities.name: EROSION
entities.description: The process of wearing away soil by wind or water

entities.name: SOIL LOSS
entities.description: The removal of the topsoil layer from the land

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area of land

entities.name: MOISTURE CONSERVATION
entities.description: Practices aimed at retaining water in the soil to benefit crops

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of land in producing crops

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in the quality of land due to various factors

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the watershed programs and research were conducted
